text:
Monthly CMS-HCC Risk Score 11 Monthly final, prospective risk score based on the applicable risk adjustment model for the MA payment year corresponding to the report period. Only populated for Final Assignment runs.
Monthly risk scores are renormalized so that the mean national assignable FFS risk score for the beneficiary's enrollment type in that month (as indicated by the corresponding monthly enrollment flag) equals 1.0. Risk scores for different enrollment categories are renormalized
